verdict: INCONCLUSIVE_DATA_PENDING — no outcome or no treatment variable in spec
verdict_reason: no outcome or no treatment variable in spec
falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is considered falsified if the pre-registered empirical test shows the opposite direction of the claim at conventional significance (p > 0.10), or if the primary outcome measure moves less than 10% in the claimed direction across the sample. Exact thresholds will be pinned in the variables and estimator blocks when this stub is promoted from draft.
falsification_test_text: Firm-FE panel of ESOP vs industry/size/age-matched non-ESOP firms 1974-2023, outcomes 5/10-year survival hazard and labour-productivity growth; falsified if ESOP survival hazard not lower at p<0.10 or productivity gap exceeds -5%.

estimate.error: no outcome or no treatment variable in spec
